project_type: C++17 AI operating system / reasoning engine
test_framework: No formal test framework - validation via compilation and manual testing
verification_instructions: Run 'make clean && make all' to verify all fixes compile correctly. The project uses .cpp includes (not .h) so the entry point mk_entry.cpp self-contains everything.
setup_instructions: Install libcurl and libsqlite3 dev headers. On macOS: brew install curl sqlite3. On Linux: apt-get install libcurl4-openssl-dev libsqlite3-dev
environment_constraints: Has internet access. Can install packages. The project targets macOS Darwin but should compile on Linux too.
contribution_requirements: Fix bugs, commit with descriptive message, push to mk-accuracy-upgrade-2026 branch.
key_patterns: Most .cpp files use #ifndef include guards and are included directly from other .cpp files (not compiled separately). The Makefile collects all .cpp files but excludes main_* and some specific files. The entry point is system/mk_entry.cpp which defines all classes inline.
relevant_files: datasets/loader.cpp - stray 'p' at end (confirmed fixed - no stray char now)
Kernel/driver/mk_echo.c - truncated file, mk_init function missing closing
ai_core/hre/composer.cpp - defines MKPersonality enum (conflicts with conversation_engine.cpp)
memory_mgmt/garbage.cpp - redefines Block struct (already in mk_memory.cpp)
ai_core/hre/hre_main.cpp - includes pattern_graph.cpp, reasoning_chains.cpp, query_parser.cpp, composer.cpp - all of which also include pattern_graph.cpp causing multiple inclusion
network/realtime_apis.cpp - includes http.cpp (double inclusion of MKHTTP)
Kernel/kernel_main.cpp - includes sub-cpp files by relative path (this is excluded from build)
system/mk_entry.cpp - the real entry point, redefines all classes inline
directory_structure: ai_core/ - AI reasoning engine and HRE submodules; datasets/ - data loading; io_routing/ - I/O abstraction; Kernel/ - simulated kernel (excluded from main build); knowledge/ - knowledge loading; memory_mgmt/ - memory management; mk_brain/ - brain modules; network/ - HTTP, search, APIs; plugins/ - plugin system; scheduler/ - task scheduler; security/ - encryption; system/ - boot, entry, shell; tools/ - standalone tools
